author: Microsoft
name: Blazor WebAssembly Service Defaults
description: A project template for creating a service defaults library for Blazor WebAssembly applications. Includes OpenTelemetry, service discovery, and resilience support for Aspire integration.
symbols/hosted/description: Configure for a hosted Blazor Web scenario where configuration flows from the server via a DOM comment. When false (default), configures for a standalone scenario with a configuration endpoint and JS initializer.
symbols/skipRestore/description: Belirtilmişse oluştururken projenin otomatik geri yüklenmesini atlar.
postActions/restore/description: Bu projenin gerektirdiği NuGet paketlerini geri yükleyin.
